title: Nick's Random Things Mod Prequel: Random Stuff
description: A mod that adds a random thing
body:
A mod that doesn't make sense this the old version of this mod I still working on the real one. Here are some things you can expect in this mod. You can make Indomie Noodles with simple boiled water, There are some added removed items from Minecraft, There are Nintendo Consoles for decoration, a new dimension using the cookie block, lots of Random items, a few new mobs, some numbers, and more crap that you can see for yourself.

This mod is very stupid and not working correctly so expect some glitches.

Just enjoy this mod with horrible items.
